first_paragraph: ***Nebria nataliae*** is a species of [ground beetle](/wiki/Ground_beetle "Ground beetle") in the [Nebriinae](/wiki/Nebriinae "Nebriinae") subfamily that is endemic to [Kyrgyzstan](/wiki/Kyrgyzstan "Kyrgyzstan").[[1]](#cite_note-catlife-1)

Species of beetle

***Nebria nataliae*** is a species of [ground beetle](/wiki/Ground_beetle "Ground beetle") in the [Nebriinae](/wiki/Nebriinae "Nebriinae") subfamily that is endemic to [Kyrgyzstan](/wiki/Kyrgyzstan "Kyrgyzstan").[[1]](#cite_note-catlife-1)
